review_protocol: INDEPENDENT REVIEW REQUIRED PRE-FREEZE (ASM-1415): a reviewer role that authored neither the definitions nor the compiler judges, per row: (a) is the constraint semantically licensed by the quoted definition read in its plain-dictionary sense? (b) is any definition content that a competent kinship ruleset needs MISSING from the compiled constraints (compiler-induced collapse hazard)? Verdicts land in inputs/mapping-review.json; pass==true is a mandatory component of /gates/compilation_lint_valid.
